---
name: Module bug
about: A component plans/validates/applies wrong, or behaves unexpectedly
title: "[bug] <component>: <short summary>"
labels: bug
---

**Component(s)**
<!-- e.g. ec2 — and the ref you consumed (tag like v0.4.0, or a commit/main). -->

**What happened**
<!-- The wrong behavior, or paste the terraform fmt/validate/plan/apply error. -->

**Expected**
<!-- What should have happened instead. -->

**Inputs / how to reproduce**
<!-- The module inputs that trigger it (instances map, cidr_block, az_count, …). Redact real ids/ARNs. -->

**Versions**
<!-- terraform version + provider version (aws/google/github). -->
